title: Indicative calendar of reserve maintenance periods
summary: This is a navigation/index page from the ECB website that lists menu links to indicative operational calendars for reserve maintenance periods covering years 2000 through 2026. No substantive content, data, decisions, or policy information is provided on this page.
key_points: This is a navigation page containing only menu links, not substantive research content.
The page lists links to operational calendars for reserve maintenance periods from 1999-2026.
No ECB rate decisions, policy statements, or economic data are present.
The actual calendar content would be on linked sub-pages not included in this crawl.
why_it_matters: This page contains no archiveable content. It serves only as a directory to access individual reserve maintenance period calendars. Researchers seeking ECB operational data should navigate to the linked sub-pages for actual calendar information.

issues_found: Source is a navigation/listing page containing only menu links to yearly calendars, no substantive content
